overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through a sunny urban canal district. The character navigates from residential streets along a waterway, crossing roads and passing pedestrians, with the downtown skyline visible in the background.

events.description: turning from residential street onto canal-side sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the street and turning left toward the canal walkway

entered.detail: orange stucco building with arched windows and balconies
calm waterway reflecting the blue sky
blue two-story house with white trim and balcony

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunny residential street lined with palm trees, approaching a canal. An orange Mediterranean-style villa dominates the left side as the character turns onto the waterfront sidewalk, revealing the waterway and distant city skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: open canal walkway with downtown skyline view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the canal sidewalk with the downtown skyline visible ahead

notable_agents.action: walking in the opposite direction along the canal path

entered.detail: white decorative bridge spanning the canal
cluster of tall glass and steel skyscrapers

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds along the open canal walkway with the water immediately to the right. The downtown skyline rises in the distance, and a white arched bridge crosses the canal ahead. Sparse pedestrians walk in the opposite direction.

events.description: crossing the street at a marked crosswalk
turning right onto the sidewalk parallel to the street

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and continuing along the sidewalk next to a wooden fence, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: standing near a building entrance talking to another person

entered.detail: light brown wooden fence running along the sidewalk
multi-story residential building with external staircases
tall wooden utility pole with street lamp

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the street at a crosswalk and turns onto a sidewalk bordered by a wooden privacy fence. The canal is temporarily out of view as the character passes residential apartment buildings and utility poles.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-shaded canal path with brief alley passage

events.description: entering a narrow alleyway between buildings
exiting the alley back to the canal path

agents.ego_description: walking along the shaded canal path, briefly cutting through a narrow alley between buildings before returning to the waterfront

notable_agents.action: woman in blue dress walking toward the camera on the canal path

entered.detail: dense green hedges lining the canal edge
low-rise building with medical signage and parking lot
tight passage between white concrete walls and buildings

segments.scene_description: The character turns back toward the canal, now walking along a shaded path lined with dense hedges. After passing a medical office building, the character briefly enters a narrow alley between buildings before emerging back to the canal walkway where other pedestrians are present.

scene_state.functional_zone: canal walkway with residential buildings and bridges

agents.ego_description: continuing along the canal path passing groups of pedestrians walking in the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: group of three pedestrians walking together in the opposite direction

entered.detail: white metal truss bridge spanning the canal

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the tree-shaded canal path, passing other pedestrians. A white metal truss bridge appears in the distance, and residential buildings line both sides of the waterway as the walk continues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunny urban canal district, transitioning from open residential streets to shaded waterfront paths. It begins along a palm-lined street beside an orange Mediterranean-style villa before turning onto a waterfront sidewalk that reveals a wide canal and the distant downtown skyline. As the character proceeds past a white arched bridge and sparse pedestrians, the scene shifts away from the water to cross a street and pass residential apartments bordered by a wooden privacy fence. The camera then follows a turn back toward the canal through a shaded path of dense hedges and a narrow alley, passing a medical office building. Finally, the view opens back up to the tree-shaded canal walkway, moving past other pedestrians toward a white metal truss bridge as residential buildings line the waterway.
